picks.match: Crystal Palace vs West Ham United
picks.reasoning: Only one fixture is available with Ladbrokes pricing today, and the edge here is slim. West Ham are in the midst of a documented revival under Nuno Espírito Santo — the Athletic ran a piece this week on what has sparked their turnaround, and the table shows them at 32 points after 32 games, fighting for mid-table security with genuine momentum. Ladbrokes price them at 35.7% implied; we estimate closer to 37% given their improved form and motivation for points. Crystal Palace at home are solid but not commanding — the home implied of 40.8% overstates their advantage against a West Ham side that has been consistently improving. Edge is marginal at +1.3%; Kelly stake is minimal. Proceed with caution.
